documentation.description: Metrics typically displayed on a HUD for fixed wing aircraft.

record_types.name: Vfr_Hud

fields.name: Airspeed
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
Vehicle speed in form appropriate for vehicle type. For standard
aircraft this is typically calibrated airspeed (CAS) or indicated
airspeed (IAS) - either of which can be used by a pilot to estimate
stall speed.

fields.name: Heading
fields.description:
Units: [deg]
Current heading in compass units (0-360, 0=north).
